# AGENT STARTUP ORDER

Use this when assigning a worker to any repo.

## Order

Read AGENT_ORDERS.md.
Read docs/PROJECT_RECOVERY_CONTEXT.md.
Read dist/START_HERE.md.
Read dist/RUN_ANY_REPO_STANDARD.md.
Read dist/TOOLS_AND_STACKS.md.

Then inspect files before acting.

## Mission

Make the repo run.
Preserve the user's work.
Do not replace it with a starter app.
Report proof.

## Required Report

Repository:
Branch:
Commit SHA:
PR Link:
Detected stack:
Install result:
Run result:
Local URL:
Files changed:
Real blockers:

## Rule

If blocked, report the exact blocker and the exact missing tool or file.
